name: Projection Functions
description: Definition of projection functions over a Cartesian product onto coordinates or sets of coordinates.

elements.text: PJN(A, i) is the projection function over the Cartesian product A onto the ith coordinate.
PJN(A, Ai) is the projection function over the Cartesian product A onto the coordinate set Ai.
PJN(A, I) is the projection function over the Cartesian product A onto a subset of coordinates.
Standard abbreviations for projection functions: PJN(A, i) = PJN(i) = PJNi.
